contacts.name: Sarah Chen
contacts.notes: Primary contact for production infrastructure issues. Prefers direct, technical communication.

contacts.name: Mike Johnson
contacts.notes: Works on odds recommendation models. Very detail-oriented. Part of the same scrum team.

contacts.name: Lisa Wong
contacts.notes: Leading the integration of our sportsbook API. Important B2B relationship.

contacts.name: David Martinez
contacts.notes: Manages sprint ceremonies. Appreciates timely updates and demo preparations.

preferences.description: User prefers professional but approachable tone in email replies
Any email mentioning production issues should be flagged as urgent
Automatically label newsletters and mass emails as FYI
Default follow-up reminder is set to 24 hours after the original email
User prefers scheduling meetings in the afternoon (after 1 PM)

org_facts.content: The Sportsbook AI/ML team operates in 2-week sprints with reviews every other Tuesday at 10 AM CET.
The sportsbook platform serves 20+ brands across multiple markets. Live betting is the highest-revenue feature.
Production incidents require a response within 15 minutes during business hours. P1 incidents need immediate escalation to the on-call team.
The ML pipeline uses MLflow for experiment tracking, deployed on AWS SageMaker. Model artifacts stored in S3.
B2B API integration is a strategic priority for Q3 2026. The /odds endpoint supports both REST and WebSocket protocols.
